description_long: This is a medium-sized, twin-engine airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in blue and gray. The aircraft features a mid-wing configuration with straight wings, each equipped with a blue engine nacelle and propeller mounted forward of the wing. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with multiple windows along the side for passenger visibility. The landing gear is visible and appears to be a tricycle configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the cockpit. The airplane displays a flag insignia on the tail and registration markings on the rear fuselage.
description: A blue and gray twin-propeller airplane with a mid-wing, conventional tail, and tricycle landing gear. The cockpit is forward-mounted with multiple side windows and visible registration markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and gray fuselage, mid-mounted wings with propeller engines, cockpit windows, and tail insignia.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin propellers, horizontal stabilizers, and single vertical tail fin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, wing, and engine details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, both propellers, and the symmetry of the wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and engine nacelles mounted forward of the wings; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
